scripts.dev: npm run dev:subgraphs & npm run dev:router
scripts.dev:router: APOLLO_ROVER_DEV_ROUTER_VERSION=2.11.0 APOLLO_KEY='service:ganesh-resp-caching:5KeANQMIb2eORFSdKkROMQ' APOLLO_GRAPH_REF='ganesh-resp-caching' rover dev --supergraph-config supergraph-config-dev.yaml --router-config router-config-dev.yaml
scripts.test: npm run test:compile && npm run test:compose
scripts.test:compose: APOLLO_ELV2_LICENSE=accept rover supergraph compose --config supergraph-config-dev.yaml --output supergraph.graphql
scripts.mcp: npm run dev:subgraphs & rover dev --mcp mcp.yaml --supergraph-config supergraph-config-dev.yaml --router-config router-config-dev.yaml
